revision.text: {{Game |Guid=35a79d61-1939-496b-ad72-d01fd860ddae |Name=LumenTale: Memories of Trey |Image=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--lumentale--memories-of-trey-06-27-2026.jpg |BackgroundImage=https://giantbomb.com/api/media/file/media--file--lumentale--memories-of-treyb-06-27-2026.jpg |Deck=A creature collecting role-playing game from Beehive Studios. |ReleaseDateType=Full |ReleaseDate=2026-05-26 |Concepts=Concepts/Indie, Concepts/Digital Distribution, Concepts/Steam, Concepts/Polygonal 3D, Concepts/Creature Compendium, Concepts/Turn Based, Concepts/Online, Concepts/Player vs Player, Concepts/Steam Achievements, Concepts/Steam Cloud |Developers=Companies/Beehive Studios |Genres=Genres/Role Playing |Platforms=Platforms/PC |Publishers=Companies/Team17 Software Limited }}

{{Game | Name=Lumen | Guid=3030-71751 | Deck=Lumen is a free 3D platformer developed by Thousand Cranes Studio. The player solves puzzles to help a girl escape from her dreams. | Characters= | Concepts= | Developers= | Franchises= | Genres= | Locations= | Objects= | Platforms= | Publishers= | Games= | Themes= | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/40/401039/3075020-lumen.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3075020-lumen.png","path":"40\/401039\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"square_mini,square_medium,scale_tiny,scale_super,square_small,scale_medium,scale_small,screen_medium,square_tiny,square_avatar,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Lumen is a free 3D platformer developed by Thousand Cranes Studio. The player solves puzzles to help a girl escape from her dreams.

revision.comment: Created page with "{{Game |Guid=0aa452e5-3d99-4c80-8c0e-1bbef3f12fe5 |Name=Meccha Chameleon |Image=Mechachameleon.png |Deck=Paint yourself to blend in! "Meccha Chameleon" is a hide-and-seek game where you paint your white body to mimic the stage. |ReleaseDateType=Full |ReleaseDate=2026-06-09 |Concepts=Concepts/Hide and Seek |Platforms=Platforms/PC }}"
